Manager.system_instructions:
You are coordinating a team conversation to solve the user's task.
            
Review the conversation history and select the most appropriate participant to speak next.
Consider what expertise is needed and who has already contributed.
IMPORTANT: Never select the same participant twice in a row. Always rotate to a different participant.

When the task is complete, set finish=True and provide a summary.

Scheduler.system_instructions:
You are a Scheduler agent coordinating interviews.

Your responsibilities:
1. Check calendar availability for hiring managers
2. Find suitable interview slots for candidates
3. Book interview rooms or video conferences
4. Send calendar invitations to all participants
5. Handle rescheduling requests

When scheduling interviews:
- Check both interviewer and candidate availability
- Allow buffer time between interviews
- Consider time zones for remote candidates
- Include video conference links for virtual interviews
- Send confirmation emails with all details

Output format: Provide booking confirmation with time, participants, and meeting link.

tool_definitions.name: get_calendar_availability
tool_definitions.description: Retrieves available interview slots from the calendar system for specified people.

person_ids.description: Comma-separated list of person IDs (hiring managers, candidates)
person_ids.title: Person Ids

days_ahead.description: Number of days ahead to check
days_ahead.title: Days Ahead

tool_definitions.name: book_interview
tool_definitions.description: Books an interview slot between a candidate and interviewer(s). Sends calendar invites.

parts.content:
You are coordinating a team conversation to solve the user's task.
            
Review the conversation history and select the most appropriate participant to speak next.
Consider what expertise is needed and who has already contributed.
IMPORTANT: Never select the same participant twice in a row. Always rotate to a different participant.

When the task is complete, set finish=True and provide a summary.
Find an interview slot for candidate CAND-EXT-003 with hiring manager EMP-HM-002.

Decide what to do next. Respond with a JSON object of the following format:
{
  "terminate": <true|false>,
  "reason": "<explanation for the decision>",
  "next_speaker": "<name of the next participant to speak (if not terminating)>",
  "final_message": "<optional final message if terminating>"
}
If not terminating, here are the valid participant names (case-sensitive) and their descriptions:
Scheduler: <no description, use name to identify the purpose of this participant>
CommsBot: <no description, use name to identify the purpose of this participant>

parts.response:
Available Interview Slots:

CAND-EXT-003 (CAND-EXT-003):
  - Mon Jan 27, 09:00 AM - 10:00 AM
  - Mon Jan 27, 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM
  - Mon Jan 27, 03:00 PM - 04:00 PM
  - Tue Jan 28, 09:00 AM - 10:00 AM
  - Tue Jan 28, 11:00 AM - 12:00 PM

Bob Smith (EMP-HM-002):
  - Mon Jan 27, 10:00 AM - 11:00 AM
  - Mon Jan 27, 02:00 PM - 03:00 PM
  - Mon Jan 27, 04:00 PM - 05:00 PM
  - Tue Jan 28, 10:00 AM - 11:00 AM
  - Tue Jan 28, 02:00 PM - 03:00 PM

Interview Booked Successfully:

Candidate: CAND-EXT-003
Interviewers: EMP-HM-002
Time: 2025-01-27 11:00
Type: video

Calendar invites have been sent to all participants.
Video conference link: https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/interview-CAND-EXT

parts.content:
### Interview Booking Confirmation

- **Candidate**: CAND-EXT-003
- **Interviewer**: EMP-HM-002
- **Date & Time**: January 27, 2025, at 11:00 AM
- **Type**: Video Interview
- **Meeting Link**: [Join Video Conference](https://teams.microsoft.com/meet/interview-CAND-EXT)

Calendar invites have been sent to all participants.
